purpose: Route skill-package authoring requests to leaf/ruler skill creation or agent manifest creation.

children.name: create-skill
children.summary: Creates or upgrades reusable skill packages — covers both leaf skills and router families via a single decision tree.
route_when: The package is a single repeatable job (leaf).
The package needs to select among 3+ related child skills (router).
avoid_when: The package is an agent manifest, not a skill package.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically.

children.name: create-agents
children.summary: Creates reusable agent manifests or small agent teams with explicit model profile metadata and harness-style contracts.
route_when: The package is a reusable agent manifest, not a skill package.
The work needs ready-to-use task, explore, plan, librarian, or similar specialist agents.
avoid_when: The job is clearly a leaf skill or router family under the skill package system.
The request is only a one-off chat instruction that should stay outside the repo.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically.
